description_long: This handcart features a robust wooden construction with a rectangular cargo bed, flanked by raised side panels and a slightly curved front barrier. The cart is supported by two large, spoked wooden wheels mounted on either side, providing stability and ease of movement. The rear of the cart is open, allowing for easy loading and unloading of goods. Two long, straight wooden handles extend from the front, designed for manual pulling or pushing. The wood appears weathered, with visible grain and a dark, reddish-brown finish, suggesting durability and frequent use. Metal fastenings are subtly visible at the wheel hubs and along the frame, reinforcing the structure.
description: A sturdy, weathered wooden handcart with large spoked wheels, raised side panels, and long front handles for manual transport. The cart has a dark, reddish-brown finish and an open rear for easy loading.
description_view_0: Front view showing the curved front barrier, raised side panels, and the two large wheels aligned on either side.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the spoked wheel, long handles extending forward, and the open rear cargo area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the open cargo bed, raised side panels, and the full length of the handles.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the second wheel, side rails, and the overall length of the cart.
